description: Real-time inventory synchronization across all platforms

items.name: Central inventory source
items.tactic: Single source of truth. DB master record. All platforms pull from DB.

items.name: 5-minute sync cycle
items.tactic: Celery beat task every 5min. Compare DB stock vs platform stock. If diff, push update to all.

items.name: Overstock detection
items.tactic: If stock > safe_stock_level: alert, prepare discount. Prevent dead inventory.

items.name: Understock alert
items.tactic: If stock < reorder_point: alert supplier, reduce ads spend, set backorder.

items.name: Auto-delist on zero stock
items.tactic: When stock hits 0, Computer Use delists automatically from all platforms. Prevent lost sales.
